text: SnapATAC2 version 2.9.0 improves the precision of p values in tl.motif_enrichment.
SnapATAC2 version 2.1.1 adds tl.motif_enrichment to perform motif enrichment analysis.
source_excerpt:
xport in `ex.export_fragments`.
  - Fix extra memory allocation of Nyström method in `tl.spectral`.
  - Various minor bug fixes related to python AnnData conversion.
  - Fix #408.
